---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact · Theodor Balan"
---

<main>

::: {.wrap}

::: {.contact-list}

::: {.contact-row}
[Email]{.contact-label} [hello@tbalan.com](mailto:hello@tbalan.com)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
[GitHub]{.contact-label} [github.com/tbalan](https://github.com/tbalan/)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
[LinkedIn]{.contact-label} [linkedin.com/in/thbalan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thbalan/)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
[Google Scholar]{.contact-label} [Scholar Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-v5tVyUAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
[Medium]{.contact-label} [medium.com/@thbalan](https://medium.com/@thbalan)
:::

:::

:::

</main>
